headline: Assessing Eurazeo (ENXTPA:RF) Valuation After Mixed Returns And Asset Management Growth
summary: Why Eurazeo Is On Investors’ Radar Today Eurazeo (ENXTPA:RF) has come under closer scrutiny after a recent spell of mixed share performance, with solid annual revenue growth set against a reported net loss and weak returns over the past year. See our latest analysis for Eurazeo. At a share price of €40.4, Eurazeo has seen short term momentum pick up, with a 1 week share price return of 6.93% following a 3 month share price decline of 24.20% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 38.90%.
